system.flavor: You turn a key in an invisible door, and the aether-bright outline of one suddenly opens up, joining two spaces.
system.effect:
Zone your turn and create two 1 space zones in range. Characters that willingly exit either space can teleport into another of these spaces, as long as it is not occupied, but no more than once a turn.
Effect effects that enter the zone can be drawn from any other space of this zone as if it were an adjacent space, and can change direction.
